assignments.name: video_prompt_1
assignments.value: A man sits with his wife and two children in their living room, watching funny cartoons together on TV. The family looks relaxed and happy, enjoying the cartoon. The room is cozy with warm lighting and comfortable seating.

assignments.name: video_prompt_2
assignments.value: The family continues watching TV, now laughing together at a funny scene. The children are pointing at the screen excitedly while the parents smile warmly. The evening atmosphere is peaceful and joyful.

assignments.name: video_prompt_3
assignments.value: The family is now standing up, clapping and cheering at the TV screen. The children are jumping with excitement while the parents laugh along. The living room is filled with happiness and energy.

assignments.name: video_prompt_4
assignments.value: The family gathers together for a group hug, still smiling from the fun cartoon. The children are hugging their parents tightly while everyone shares a warm moment of togetherness.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO meetings (
  contact_phone,
  contact_name,
  title,
  date_time,
  purpose,
  location,
  status,
  created_by_phone,
  created_at
)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'scheduled', $1, NOW())
RETURNING id, contact_phone, contact_name, title, date_time, purpose, location, status, created_by_phone, created_at;

UPDATE meetings 
SET 
  status = 'invitation_sent',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, status, updated_at;

INSERT INTO meetings (
  contact_phone,
  contact_name,
  title,
  date_time,
  purpose,
  location,
  status,
  scheduler_phone,
  user_id,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  'pending_confirmation',
  $7,
  $8,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING 
  id,
  contact_phone,
  contact_name,
  title,
  date_time,
  purpose,
  location,
  status,
  scheduler_phone,
  user_id,
  created_at;

assignments.name: core_prompt
assignments.value: A middle-aged man with short brown hair, black rectangular glasses, clean-shaven face, wearing a royal blue casual button-up shirt. His wife has shoulder-length straight brown hair parted in the middle, wearing a forest green knit sweater. An 8-year-old boy with short dark brown hair wearing a bright red t-shirt with visible collar. A 6-year-old girl with long brown hair in a ponytail wearing a sunshine yellow dress with short sleeves. They are seated on a beige linen fabric sofa with visible texture and wooden legs. The living room has cream-colored matte walls. A traditional wooden coffee table with dark finish sits in front of the sofa. Soft golden evening light comes from a brass floor lamp positioned to the left, creating warm ambient illumination with soft shadows. The camera is positioned at eye level, 8 feet from the sofa, using a 35mm lens equivalent. Cinematic 24fps, warm color grading with enhanced golden tones, slight film grain. Consistent exposure and white balance throughout.

assignments.name: clip_actions
assignments.value:
=["The family watches colorful cartoons on a 55-inch flat-screen TV mounted on the wall. All four members sit close together on the sofa, faces illuminated by the TV's soft glow. Their expressions are relaxed and content. The father has his arm around his wife's shoulder. The children sit between their parents, leaning slightly forward. Subtle ambient movement only - occasional blinks and small head movements. Static camera.",
"The family bursts into laughter while still seated on the sofa in the exact same positions. The children's faces light up with joy as they point excitedly at the TV screen with their right hands. The mother covers her mouth while laughing. The father's eyes crinkle with genuine amusement behind his glasses. Same lighting, same camera position, continuous from previous clip. Maintain all character details and clothing exactly."]

core_prompt
assignments.value: A middle-aged man with short brown hair, black rectangular glasses, clean-shaven face, wearing a royal blue casual button-up shirt. They are seated on a beige linen fabric sofa with visible texture and wooden legs. The living room has cream-colored matte walls. A traditional wooden coffee table with dark finish sits in front of the sofa. Soft golden evening light comes from a brass floor lamp positioned to the left, creating warm ambient illumination with soft shadows. assignments.name: clip_actions
assignments.value: =["The family watches colorful cartoons on a 55-inch flat-screen TV mounted on the wall. All four members sit close together on the sofa, faces illuminated by the TV's soft glow. Their expressions are relaxed and content. The father has his arm around his wife's shoulder. The children sit between their parents, leaning slightly forward. Subtle ambient movement only - occasional blinks and small head movements. Static camera.","The family bursts into laughter while still seated on the sofa in the exact same positions. The children's faces light up with joy as they point excitedly at the TV screen with their right hands. The mother covers her mouth while laughing. The father's eyes crinkle with genuine amusement behind his glasses. Same lighting, same camera position, continuous from previous clip. Maintain all character details and clothing exactly.","The family begins to stand up from the sofa, rising together in unison. The children jump up first with arms raised, clapping their hands above their heads. The parents follow, standing and clapping at chest level. All four faces show excitement and joy. The father's blue shirt and mother's green sweater remain clearly visible. Same golden lamp light, same cream walls, same camera angle. Clothing and character features unchanged.","The family forms a tight group hug standing in front of the beige sofa. The parents embrace from the sides while the children hug from the front, arms wrapped around everyone. All four faces are visible and smiling warmly. The father's glasses catch a subtle glint from the floor lamp. The mother's green sweater and children's red and yellow clothing are clearly visible. Same warm golden lighting from the floor lamp, same cream walls, same eye-level camera angle. Complete visual continuity with all previous clips."]
